title: The Collection of Statistics Act, 2008
full_text: The Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 सांख्यितकी संग्रहण अधिनियम, 2008 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200907 Act Number: 07 Enactment Date: 2009-01-07 Act Year: 2009 Short Title: The Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 Hindi Title: सांख्यितकी संग्रहण अधिनियम, 2008 Long Title: An Act to facilitate the collection of statistics on economic, demographic, social, scientific and environmental aspects, and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation Enforcement Date: 11-06-2010 Notification: 11th June, 2010, vide notification No. S.O. 1416(E), dated 9th June, 2010, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Collection of statistics. Show Related Subordinates Section 3A. Nodal officer. Section 4. Powers of appropriate Government to appoint statistics officer, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Power of statistics officer to call for information. Section 6. Duty of informants. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. All agencies to assist. Section 8. Right of access to records or documents. Section 9. Security of information. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Appropriate Government authorised to disclose certain information. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. Disclosure of information schedules for bona fide research or statistical purposes. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Disclosure of historical documents. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Security of recorded information. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Section 15B. Appeal. Section 15C. Recovery. Section 27. Power in respect of core statistics. Section 28. Power to give directions. Section 29. Public servants. Section 30. Bar of jurisdiction. Section 31. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 32. Overriding effect. Section 33. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 34. Repeal and savings.
